rulings.Case Title: DEAN TURCHI VS. RAYMOND DAVIS TREW ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion To Be Relieved
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday December 28, 2016, line 1. PLAINTIFF DEAN TURCHI Notice And Motion To Be Relieved GRANTED. No opposition filed. Counsel to prepare order. =(501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: ADRIENNE R. LALANNE ET AL VS. TRINH LAM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday December 28, 2016, line 2. PLAINTIFF ADRIENNE LALANNE, CHRISTOPHER HEINMILLER, ANASTASIA HEINMILLER, VICTORIA HEINMILLER MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD DENIED without prejudice. Proof of Service indicates that only Adrienne Lalanne and Christopher Heinmiller were served. The only documents served on them: declaration and order. Plaintiff's counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future. =(501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL J. NILAND VS. HUGO ZEPEDA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Initial Responses To Supplemental Interrogatories, Supplemental Requests For Production, Requests For Production, Set Two, And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday December 28, 2016, line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT NILAND, MICHAEL, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE FOR, LARIZADEH, MAHMOUD, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Initial Responses To Supplemental Interrogatories, Supplemental Requests For Production, Requests For Production, Set Two, And For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED. No opposition filed. Complete responses to discovery without objections to be served within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $683.20. =(501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz
